race.comment: CHEEKY SMIRK (4) was well in the market second-up when he knocked up late in the shifty conditions to finish second over 1300m at Canberra. Maps well again and should prove too strong here on the firmer surface. Blinkers off and ready to win. YOUR CHILLI (6) heavily supported second-up when he circled the field for a gritty Maiden victory over 1300m at Canberra. Confidence is high and not without top-three prospects. MY PROCLAMA (8) sat off the good tempo second-up when she got off the mark with a tough win as fav over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Has the speed to overcome the awkward gate and can give this a shake. VIDIA (12) handy filly heading in the right direction. Tough run in the heavy (9) going second-up with a game on-pace second over 1200m at Kembla Grange in C1 class. Holds a forward position and expected to figure prominently.
